name: Mayank Nagda
tagline: PhD in Generative AI | AI Researcher & Engineer

hero.pretitle: Generative AI · Applied Science · NLP · Time Series · Industrial AI
hero.title: Building reliable generative AI systems from research to production
hero.summary: PhD candidate in Generative AI. I bridge foundational research, large-scale retrieval, and trustworthy generative modelling to solve high-impact problems.

sections.news: Updates on job, publications, talks, and milestones from my research and applied AI work.
sections.experience: I lead cross-functional AI initiatives that blend generative modelling, retrieval, and production engineering to help teams deliver measurable impact.
sections.projects: Research and engineering programs that demonstrate how I operationalize LLMs, diffusion models, and physics-aware ML for discovery, simulation, and evaluation.
sections.education: Graduate training focused on machine learning, generative modelling, and building software systems that scale.
sections.publications: Representative publications covering generative AI, topic modelling, and evaluation frameworks.
sections.skills: A condensed view of the leadership, ML, and systems capabilities I bring to collaborative research and product teams.

news.title: Talk at ECML-PKDD 2025
news.description: Our latest work on diffusion-based time series style transfer will be presented at SynDAiTE workshop in ECML-PKDD 2025.

news.title: Presenting at NAACL 2025
news.description: Preparing to present research on aligning neural topic models with author- and label-aware priors.

highlights: Led generative AI programs that combined LLMs and diffusion models for NLP and time-series applications, creating new approaches for data generation and large-scale retrieval.
Built search, discovery, and recommendation systems operating across millions of documents, aligning results with metadata, LLM agents, and human feedback.
Engineered production-grade pipelines that transitioned prototypes into scalable systems, reducing simulation costs and accelerating experimentation with cross-functional teams.
Mentored researchers and engineers while supporting hiring and talent development across the AI group.
Improved crop-yield forecasting accuracy by 20% for satellite geospatial analytics with advanced time-series models.
Developed and deployed anomaly detection models that flag dried trees, reducing wildfire risk across Europe and South America.
Delivered robust data pipelines with monitoring and iterative model updates tailored to stakeholder workflows.
Implemented and evaluated algorithms across NLP, time-series analysis, and computer vision.
Drove experiment design, ablations, result validation, and paper writing for multiple research efforts.
Dissertation: Deep Learning with Structured Inductive Biases and Domain Constraints.
Coursework: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science, Software Management.

projects.title: AI systems and generative modelling programs
projects.summary: A closer look at how I combine LLMs, diffusion models, retrieval, and physics-aware ML to deliver measurable outcomes for research and industry partners.
projects.intro: Each project advances generative AI reliability, large-scale retrieval, or modeling for critical domains. Many began as research collaborations and matured into production-grade systems.

publications.summary: Work spanning generative modeling, topic modelling, anomaly detection, and trustworthy evaluation—published at venues such as ACL, IJCAI, and COLING.
